content:
{
  "schema": "brainflow.cli_arg_safety.v1",
  "max_arg_chars": 6000,
  "max_total_chars": 20000,
  "prefer_file_payload": true,
  "truncate_long_fields": true,
  "truncate_strategy": "head-tail",
  "head_chars": 2000,
  "tail_chars": 1000,
  "notes": "Central policy for any CLI invocations; keep prompts compact to avoid Windows argv limits."
}
